_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description:
You can:
- partner with other business areas to set the metrics needed to measure progress towards organisational objectives
- monitor performance, recognising when to change direction of the organisation
- work with your partners to decide and deliver people, process and technology changes based on performance data
Examples of leadership using this skill:
- sharing performance indicators that are important for digital, data and technology with senior leaders in a way that influences metrics across the organisation
- translating performance insights into required change and negotiating with senior leaders to see this change through
- communicating performance-led insights and recommendations to the board that identify opportunities, highlight risks and show progress
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-004 (AB, cosine: 0.517), LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.569). Shared vocabulary: [across, objectives]. DDaT-only terms [areas, based, board, business, change, changes] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, boundaries, build, cross, establishing, functional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.839 (P=0.814, R=0.866). R exceeds P by 0.052 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 112 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance:
NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "You can:
- partner with other business areas to set the metrics needed to measur" and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.537 ≈ STS 0.569 (gap 0.032). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [across, objectives] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Shared tokens: [across, objectives]. DDaT-only: [areas, based, board, business, change, changes]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, boundaries, build, cross, establishing, functional].
